{{Infobox character
| name = Makiel
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|binding fragments from the void with his will, manipulates the Way}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, create planets}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|, produce ghostly projections of his sword}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|, manages Fate, watch futures, trace threads of causality}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|, restoration skills, transference ritual}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|First Judge of the Abidan Court, [[judge|Judge]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|, [[The Hound|the Hound]], Judge designation zero-zero-one}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, [[Mad King]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, leader of the First Division}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Abidan Court]], [[Abidan]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|, [[First Division]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Unsouled (novel)|Unsouled]]
}}

''See also: [[Makiel Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Makiel, also known as the [[Hound]], is the First [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]] and the leader of the [[First Division]]. A highly skilled individual, Makiel is unique for being proficient in all seven disciplines of the [[Way]], a feat unmatched by other [[Judges]] like [[Ozriel]]. As the [[Judge]] of [[Fate]], Makiel possesses predictive abilities that rival those of the [[Reaper]] and maintains a constant connection to the [[Way]] by watching the past and future through a celestial lens. Makiel's home is located at the north pole of [[Oversight]]'s main planet, and his authority is supported by a loyal right hand, [[Gadrael]]. In combat, Makiel utilizes seamless white armor and the [[Sword of Makiel]], a massive two-handed blade featuring purple energy veins that was historically used for capital punishment among the early [[Abidan]]. Makiel also conducted extensive research into duplicating the [[Reaper]]'s Scythe, successfully forging twelve prototype versions. Throughout his tenure, Makiel has been a central figure in the internal politics of the [[Abidan Court]], frequently opposing [[Ozriel]]'s actions and attempting to strip him of his authority. Makiel has faced significant conflict, including a battle with [[the Mad King]] that resulted in damage to his very existence and necessitated a period of recovery. Following these events, Makiel eventually retired from his position to make amends for past failures and responsibilities.}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Makiel]] is a being who focuses on the bigger picture rather than mortal problems.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Makiel]] is someone [[Suriel]] considers in her planning.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c11">''Unsouled'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Makiel]] is the First [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Makiel]] may have planned for [[Suriel]] to face the reality of the situation by dirtying her hands.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Makiel]] expects [[Suriel]] to search for [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Makiel]] is known as the [[Hound]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21">''Blackflame'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Makiel]] is [[Judge]] designation zero-zero-one.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A member of the [[Court]], Makiel is a designation of influence whose presence manifests as blazing violet eyes. This entity possesses dark brown skin and silver-streaked black hair, often using white-gauntleted hands to transmit messages through celestial lenses. To enforce natural laws at [[Oversight]], Makiel manipulates the [[Way]] and created the [[Oversight]] system by [[binding]] fragments of the [[void]] with his will. Ultimately, Makiel maintains a significant influence over the [[fate]] of [[Cradle]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] created the [[Oversight]] system by [[binding]] fragments from the [[void]] with his will.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] manipulates the [[Way]] to enforce natural laws at [[Oversight]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel's Presence]] manifests as eyes.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] uses white-gauntleted hands to transmit messages via celestial lenses.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] has dark brown skin and silver-streaked black hair.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]]'s eyes blaze a bright violet.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] is a member of the [[Court]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] is a designation of influence detected in the report.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Makiel]] has influence on the [[fate]] of [[Cradle]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Known as [[the Mad King]], Makiel possesses the ability to create entire planets. His immense presence is capable of guiding his own power without any conscious intervention from him. During a period of observation, he released a celestial lens to view the past and forged twelve prototype scythes that were eventually stolen by the Angler. Furthermore, he has projected a map detailing the territories of [[Abidan]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel]] can create planets.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel's Presence]] can guide his own power without conscious intervention.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel]] is viewing the past through a celestial lens.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel]] forged twelve prototype scythes that the Angler stole.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel]] released a celestial lens.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel]] projected a map of [[Abidan territory]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21">''Uncrowned'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Makiel]] is [[the Mad King]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|As a [[Judge]], Makiel implements alterations that accelerate the destiny of [[Cradle]]. He appears clad in seamless white armor with dark skin weathered by his mortal existence. Wielding the massive two-handed [[Sword of Makiel]], also known as [[the Sword]] of the First [[Judge]], he utilizes a weapon once used to execute the first generation of [[Abidan]]. During combat, he can swing this great blade with both hands or produce ghostly projections of it. Makiel also possesses the power to blast [[the Mad King]] out of the world.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">10</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]]'s alterations speed [[Cradle]]'s destiny.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c18">''Bloodline'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]] wears seamless white armor.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]] wields the [[Sword of Makiel]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Sword of Makiel]] is a massive two-handed blade that was used to pass capital punishment on the first generation of [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]] wields [[the Sword]] of the First [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]]'s skin is dark and weathered by his mortal [[life]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]] is a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]] can produce ghostly projections of his [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]] can blast [[the Mad King]] out of the world.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Makiel]] swung a massive [[sword]] two-handed.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|As a [[Judge]] capable of matching [[Ozriel]] in open combat, Makiel manages the threads of [[Fate]] by watching futures and tracing causality. During her interactions with [[Ozriel]], their meetings eventually became openly hostile, particularly after she urged the execution of [[Ozmanthus]] and acknowledged the utility of his [[scythe]]. While [[the Mad King]] planned to isolate [[Sector Eleven]] before delivering a killing blow, it was noted that no two [[Judges]] could face him without Makiel's presence. Because of this necessity, [[Suriel]] remained unable to leave her [[Iteration]] until Makiel was restored. Ultimately, after scanning the future, Makiel looked over others with coldness and demanded their surrender once she found a specific course of action acceptable.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">11</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel]] cannot leave her [[Iteration]] until [[Makiel]] is restored.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|No two [[Judges]] can fight [[the Mad King]] without [[Makiel]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Mad King]] intends to isolate [[Sector Eleven]] and then move in for the kill.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] urged that [[Ozmanthus]] be executed.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] admitted the utility of [[Ozriel’s Scythe]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] manages [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] can watch futures and trace threads of causality.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] looked over others coldly and demanded surrender.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] scanned the future and found a specific course of action acceptable.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ozriel]] had meetings with [[Makiel]] that became openly hostile.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25">''Reaper'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] is a [[Judge]] who can match [[Ozriel]] in open combat.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c25" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|As an [[Abidan]] who possesses a [[Mantle]], Makiel previously placed seals upon the [[Reaper]]. Following the disappearance of [[Ozriel]], the entity kept [[Suriel]] under close observation. In a vision of the future, Makiel acted as one of the entities that helped erase [[Daruman]]. Later, Makiel watched from [[Fate]] as a battle unfolded between [[Suriel]] and [[the Mad King]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Makiel]] placed seals on the [[Reaper]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Makiel]] kept [[Suriel]] under close observation after [[Ozriel]]'s disappearance.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Makiel]] is one of the entities that helped erase [[Daruman]] in a vision of the future.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Makiel]] is an [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Makiel]] possesses a [[Mantle]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Makiel]] watches the battle between [[Suriel]] and [[the Mad King]] in [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c24">''Dreadgod'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Ruling over vast stretches of the [[Way]], Makiel observes various engagements from the back of his mind through a [[Presence]] that functions as an eye floating over his shoulder. This entity, who is actually a [[Phoenix]] named Tommess, admits to having created the [[Scythes]] that were stolen and wields the [[Reaper]]'s Scythe. Driven by a goal to kill [[Daruman]] and [[Ozriel]], he intends to relinquish the [[Mantle of the Hound]] should he survive. Throughout these events, [[Suriel]] harbors anger toward him, even as Tommess utilizes restoration skills and performs a ritual to transfer his [[life]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Suriel]] feels anger toward [[Makiel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c1">''Waybound'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] observes engagements from the back of his mind.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] rules over stretches of the [[Way]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]]'s goal is to kill [[Daruman]] and [[Ozriel]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] possesses a [[Presence]] that acts as an eye floating over his shoulder.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] admits to creating the [[Scythes]] that were stolen.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] intends to give up the [[Mantle of the Hound]] if he survives.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] wields the [[Reaper]]'s Scythe.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c22">''Waybound'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] has restoration skills.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] is a [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]]'s real name is Tommess.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Makiel]] performed a transference ritual to transfer his [[life]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Makiel]] was the [[Hound]] and leader of the [[First Division]], and was a [[Judge]] skilled with all seven disciplines.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c4">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Court]] needs to find a new [[Makiel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Makiel]] named a successor.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Makiel]] accuses [[Ozriel]] of dereliction of duty and violating the [[Eledari Pact]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|Makiel looked over them coldly. “Surrender.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Abidan Court]]
[[Category:Abidan]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
